headline: DTE Energy intends to pause future electric rate requests following upcoming filing as data centers come online
summary: DTE Energy (NYSE: DTE) announced today that its electric company intends to forego asking for rate increases for at least two years following its upcoming filing with the Michigan Public Service Commission (MPSC) on April 28, 2026.
